description:
Creality Print is a self-developed Fused deposition modeling slicing software produced by Creality.

It's a practical and easy-to-use tool that can help you remote control and monitor your 3D printer and help print directly from your computer.
Version 6.0.5 Update Highlights:
- 1.Fix bugs and lag issues during Gcode export.
- 2.Fix known issues in WAN printing process.
- 3.Fix known issues on Device and Details pages.
- 4.Fix multi-language UI compatibility and installation issues.
- 5.Resolved inability to save process presets as separate files.
- 6.Fixed prime tower position shifting when switching printer.
- 7.Fix partial compatibility issues in Mac.
- 8.Fix the known issues
